problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Stem. Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
